MySQL 仪表盘（使用 address 筛选，用于中心端 Categraf 采: MySQL Dashboard (filtered by address, for a central Categraf scraping multiple remote MySQL instances)
MySQL 仪表盘（使用 instance 筛选，需要采集时自行打上 insta: MySQL Dashboard (filtered by instance, requires attaching an instance label at collection time)
MySQL 仪表盘，适用于 Categraf 采集本机 MySQL 的场景: MySQL Dashboard, for Categraf scraping the local MySQL instance
